mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE (phoneNumber = #{account} OR userMailbox = #{account}) AND userPassword = #{userPassword} AND userType = '普通用户'
SELECT * FROM user WHERE inviteCode = #{inviteCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (userID, userPassword, userType, phoneNumber, userMailbox, userName, registerTime, inviteCode) VALUES (#{userID}, #{userPassword}, #{userType}, #{phoneNumber}, #{userMailbox}, #{userName}, #{registerTime}, #{inviteCode})
